metadata.description: Compound Marketing — the marketing twin of Compound Engineering: a staged, report-at-each-gate marketing workflow with approval gates.

plugins.name: compound-marketing
plugins.description: Staged marketing workflow (audit → analyze → plan → review → execute) with approval gates, a /cm front-door dispatcher, a shared stage contract, plus experiment, handoff, and compounding-learning skills. The marketing twin of Compound Engineering.
